debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
g : V → U
h : g ∘ f = id
⊢ image g ∘ image f = id

proof:
funext fun S => funext fun x => propext $ Iff.intro
    (fun ⟨_, ⟨x', hx', rfl⟩, hgx⟩ => (congr_fun h x').symm.trans hgx ▸ hx')
    (fun hx => ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩)
failed_attempts:
by
  funext A; apply Set.ext; intro x; constructor
  · rintro ⟨y, ⟨x', hA, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    rwa [congr_fun h]
  · intro hA
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hA, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩

by
  funext A
  rw [Function.comp_apply, image_comp, h, image_id]
  rfl
by rw [← image_comp, h, image_id]

by
  funext A
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · intro h1
    rcases h1 with ⟨y, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    rw [congr_fun h z]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩

    (λ hx => ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩)))
by rw [← image_comp, h, image_id]
by rw [← image_comp, h, image_id]
